basic_details.job_title: RRB ALP (CEN 01/2026) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot Posts
basic_details.short_information: RRB Recruitment 2026 offers 11,127 vacancies for Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, ITI, B.E/B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official RRB website, rrbapply.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Railways, Government of India (Various Zonal Railways)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).
seo_tags: Railway Recruitment Boards Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026

qualification.education_qualification: Regular Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute or equivalent qualification recognized by the Central Government.

selection_process: Merit-based on HSC / 10+2 marks (State-wise, District-wise, Category-wise) + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the Bank's website (https://punjabandsind.bank.in/) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily complete 100% registration on both the NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) and the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/). Candidates must also note down their Enrollment ID generated on the NATS portal as it is required while applying.
